posts.author: rdvs34283
posts.title: Republicans have a 40-8 majority in the Oklahoma Senate, yet we couldn't get more than 14 votes behind the proposition that illegals should not get medicaid.

quotedTweet.content:
The OK Senate finally took a break from their vacation to show up to work today.

So the OK Freedom Caucus just forced a vote on HB4423 to prohibit illegal aliens from getting Medicaid.

Everyone who voted ✅ voted for the bill to STOP welfare benefits to illegals.

Everyone else

twitter.content:
So Republicans have a 40-8 majority in the Oklahoma Senate, yet we couldnt get more than 14 votes behind the proposition that illegals should not get medicaid. 

Again, when you think the problem nationally is the filibuster or not enough of a majority, you are wrong.  Most
